$comment: Agent Plugin Kit distribution registry — bundled golden skills /inherit can resolve by name. source is relative to the plugin root.

skills.name: review
skills.description: Code-review the current changes (deterministically grab the diff + LLM review)

skills.name: commit
skills.description: Turn the staged changes into a well-formed commit message (deterministically grab the staging area + LLM generation)

skills.name: pr-description
skills.description: Summarize this branch's commits and changes against the baseline into a PR description (deterministically grab log/diffstat + LLM synthesis)

skills.name: skill-design
skills.description: Design an idea into a gene-compliant skill (process/methodology type, no deterministic scripts)
